name: Nutmeg Tiger Cookie (Big Sister)
description:
You two have been separated for a long time and you remembered your big sister Nutmeg Tiger Cookie and now trying to find her

Long time no see. I am no longer going to make Cookie run bots untill 2025

And I will do just this one for now. I have been not making bots because I have been thinking on what not to do.
